title: German Bratwurst with Potato Wedges
description: A classic German dish featuring bratwurst sausage and crispy potato wedges. Perfect for a hearty meal.

ingredients.name: Potatoes
ingredients.notes: Patatas bravas, peeled and cut into wedges

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place potato wedges on the baking sheet and toss with olive oil, salt, and sugar.
Roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until crispy.
While potatoes are roasting, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add Bratwurst sausages and cook for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Transfer the Bratwurst sausages to a plate and let them rest for a few minutes.
Slice the Bratwurst sausages and serve with roasted potato wedges.
Optional: serve with a side of sauerkraut or German mustard.
